title: Pimpinella pimpinelloideum
taxonomy: Pimpinella pimpinelloideum is a species of plant in the family Apiaceae. It is a type of herbaceous plant commonly found in mountainous regions. The plant is native to the Himalayas and is known to be a close relative of the common anise. Pimpinella pimpinelloideum is often classified as a member of the genus Pimpinella, which comprises several species of plants with similar characteristics. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and its shared traits with other members of the genus.
